name: Cardinal Health, Inc.
description: Cardinal Health, Inc. is a distributor of pharmaceuticals, a global manufacturer and distributor of medical and laboratory products, and a provider of performance and data solutions for healthcare facilities. With operations in more than 30 countries and approximately 48,000 employees globally, the company serves as a crucial link in the healthcare supply chain, delivering clinically proven medical products and pharmaceuticals to pharmacies, hospitals, ambulatory surgery centers, clinical laboratories, and physician offices worldwide.
